overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street at night. The scene features towering buildings with holographic advertisements, flying vehicles, and diverse pedestrians on wide sidewalks.

character passes a pedestrian in a white tank top walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past closed shops with graffiti-covered roll-up doors

man in white tank top holding a drink walking toward the camera

tall buildings covered with glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements in pink and green
tall poles with bright white lighting illuminating the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by graffiti-covered roll-up doors on the left and a busy street on the right. Neon advertisements glow overhead on towering buildings while a red sports car passes by. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, including a man in a white tank top carrying a drink.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated transit structure with reduced lighting

events.description: green sports car parked on the right pulls out into traffic and drives away
walking under the elevated overpass structure with red NO ENTRY signage visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the street narrows and enters a covered underpass section with more pedestrians

woman in beige outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal elevated walkway or transit structure spanning across the street overhead
futuristic green sports car with black accents parked on the street side
red illuminated sign reading NO ENTRY mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks beneath a green elevated transit structure that creates a covered walkway. A green sports car pulls out from the right side and drives into traffic. The lighting becomes darker under the overpass where a red NO ENTRY sign is visible, and more pedestrians appear on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with massive holographic building displays and flying traffic

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into a wide open plaza with towering buildings
large holographic displays on building facade begin showing colorful rainbow glitch patterns

agents.ego_description: walking into a spacious plaza surrounded by towering buildings with massive glitching holographic displays overhead

notable_agents.action: man in red vest walking ahead toward the plaza center
futuristic black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall building covered in massive colorful glitching holographic displays showing rainbow patterns
concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance on the left side
futuristic flying car visible in the distance above the street level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive building with glitching rainbow holographic displays. The space feels more open with visible sky between structures. A man in a red vest walks ahead while futuristic cars drive past on the right, and flying vehicles are visible in the distance above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into a vast, holographic plaza. It begins on a narrow sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered roll-up doors and towering advertisements, passing pedestrians and a red sports car on the adjacent street. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts beneath a green elevated transit structure, where the lighting dims and a red no-entry sign appears while a green sports car merges into the traffic. The camera then emerges from the shadows of the overpass into a wide-open plaza dominated by a massive building with glitching rainbow holograms. Finally, the environment expands to reveal a glimpse of the sky, with flying vehicles drifting in the distance and futuristic cars streaming past on the right.
